steps.title: Isolate y from each inequality
steps.content:
From $y < 42 - 7x$, we can rewrite as $42 - 7x > y$.
From $\frac{y}{7} > 10$, we get $y > 70$.

So $y$ is bounded below by $70$ and above by $42 - 7x$.

steps.title: Combine the constraints
steps.content:
For the system to have solutions, we need $42 - 7x > y > 70$.
From $42 - 7x > 70$:
$$-7x > 28$$
$$x < -4$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
